description_long: This vending machine features a modern, rectangular design with a predominantly black exterior and a large, curved front panel in shades of white, gray, and light blue. The front panel includes a vertical row of rectangular selection buttons on the right, a small display or payment interface above the buttons, and a wide, horizontal product retrieval slot near the bottom. The sides are solid black with no visible features, while the back panel displays a metallic surface with a visible cooling coil pattern, indicating refrigeration capability. The machine appears robust and is likely constructed from metal and plastic, with glass or acrylic possibly used for the front panel. Its overall appearance is clean and utilitarian, suitable for placement in urban public spaces.
description: A modern, rectangular vending machine with a black body, geometric front panel, selection buttons, and a visible product slot.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main interface, including the geometric panel, selection buttons, display/payment area, and product retrieval slot.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a plain, solid black surface with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a metallic panel with a visible cooling coil, indicating refrigeration, and a black frame.
description_view_3: The right side view is similar to the left, showing a plain, solid black surface with no features.
attribute_display_panel: A small rectangular display panel is located above the selection buttons on the right side of the front panel; it appears to be digital or illuminated, but no specific content is visible.
attribute_payment_interface: A compact payment interface is integrated next to the display panel, likely supporting card or contactless payments, but no coin or bill slots are clearly visible.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: There are seven rectangular, vertically aligned selection buttons on the right side of the front panel, each individually separated and unlabeled.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A wide, horizontal product retrieval slot is located near the bottom center of the front panel, bordered in black, with a recessed opening.
